studies.title: Evaluation of the Impact of DiGAs in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes mellitus in daily practice

_verification.reason: The study explicitly investigates the impact of Una Health on patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus, as mentioned in both the German and English summaries of the EDDY III study. The product name 'Una Health' is directly referenced multiple times in the trial descriptions.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicentre, open-controlled observational study with an intraindividual control group, indicating it is an observational design collecting real-world evidence rather than a randomized controlled trial.
